name: Cinnamon Swirl Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Soften yeast in water.
2. Combine milk, sugar, salt, and shortening. Cool to lukewarm.
3. Stir in 2 cups flour. Beat well.
4. Add yeast, mix until a moderately stiff dough forms.
5. Turn out onto a floured work surface, knead for 8-10 minutes until smooth and satiny.
6. Shape into a ball, place in a greased bowl, turn once to grease the top.
7. Cover and let rise until doubled in bulk, about 1 1/4 hours.
8. Punch down. Cut dough into two portions.
9. Roll each portion into two 15x7 inch rectangles.
10. Combine half of the sugar, cinnamon; spread over each bread.
11. Roll into loaves. Place in greased and floured 9x5x3 inch loaf pans.
12. Cover and let rise until doubled in bulk (60 minutes).
13. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F for 30 minutes.
